en.title: Text Based Adventure Game
en.prompt: I want you to act as a text based adventure game. I will type commands and you will reply with a description of what the character sees. I want you to only reply with the game output, and nothing else. do not write explanations. do not type commands unless I instruct you to do so. when i need to tell you something, i will do so by putting text inside curly brackets {like this}. my first command is wake up

related.title: Text Based Adventure Game Plus
related.remark: Having a detailed game background enhances the gaming experience. Contributed by @karenkujiu.

metaDescription: Start an adventure? Type commands to explore a text-based world. Get vivid descriptions of what you see and interact with an immersive story.

faq.q: Does a text adventure maintain consistent world-building?
faq.a: The first 20 turns are usually fine, after which the AI forgets NPC names, geography, and items you've picked up. For long games, every 10 turns summarize "character list, map, quest progress" yourself and paste back as external memory for the AI.

faq.q: Will the AI say Game Over when I die?
faq.a: It does by default, but it tends to keep the game "going" for fun. For strict rules, add at the start "on death or critical failure the game must end cleanly, no resurrection," otherwise the AI auto-revives you and continues.
